hypothesis: Incorporating low-resolution LC–MS (mass) spectra as an additional input modality to the Transformer—alongside the IR mixture spectrum, reported concentration, and molecular formula—will increase Top–10 accuracy for detecting minority components at 10% concentration in binary mixtures by at least 20 percentage points and will increase Top–10 accuracy on balanced ternary mixtures by at least 25 percentage points compared to the current IR-only aligned model.
